source_refs.quote: The crew discovers that the map is also a record of earlier failed journeys.

book_essence: The map preserves evidence of earlier failed journeys.
dramatization: Kael turns the map toward the lantern and the old routes flare into view.

character_intent.intent: Convince the crew that the warnings are real.

visual_intent: Lantern light isolates the inked failure routes.
must_preserve: The map records earlier failed journeys.
may_compress: The individual names written beside each route.
